channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [SAHARA] Sahara One Media & Entertainment Ltd. Reports Q3 2026 Financial Results
item.description:
Sahara One Media & Entertainment Ltd. has reported its unaudited financial results for the quarter ended September 30, 2026. The company's total income from operations stands at Rs. 13,00,000 for the quarter. The net profit for the period before tax, exceptional and/or extraordinary items, is Rs. 24,16,000. The net profit for the period after tax, after exceptional and/or extraordinary items, is Rs. 8,80,000. The company's Earnings Per Share (of Rs 10/- each) Basic and Diluted for the period is Rs. 0.11 and Rs. 0.18, respectively.

  • Total income from operations for the quarter is Rs. 13,00,000.
  • Net profit before tax, exceptional and/or extraordinary items is Rs. 24,16,000.
  • Net profit after tax, after exceptional and/or extraordinary items is Rs. 8,80,000.
  • Earnings Per Share (of Rs 10/- each) Basic for the period is Rs. 0.11.
  • Earnings Per Share (of Rs 10/- each) Diluted for the period is Rs. 0.18.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Sahara One Media & Entertainment Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [BELRISE] Belrise Industries Issues Corporate Guarantee of GBP 1,980,000 for Deferred Consideration
item.description:
Belrise Industries Ltd has informed the exchange about the issuance of a corporate guarantee in favor of certain sellers as security for payment of deferred consideration. The guarantee, amounting to GBP 1,980,000, is in connection with a Share Purchase Agreement executed between Belrise UK Holdings Limited, a step-down wholly owned subsidiary of the company, and the shareholders of Chester Hall Precision Engineering Holdings Limited. This guarantee represents a contingent liability for the company with no immediate impact on its financials.

  • Belrise Industries has issued a corporate guarantee of GBP 1,980,000 for a Share Purchase Agreement.
  • The guarantee is in favor of certain sellers and is a contingent liability for the company.
  • The agreement is between Belrise UK Holdings Limited, a step-down wholly owned subsidiary of Belrise Industries, and the shareholders of Chester Hall Precision Engineering Holdings Limited.
  • The guarantee has been issued as security for payment of deferred consideration.
  • There is no immediate impact on the financials of Belrise Industries.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Belrise Industries Ltd | Category: Deals

item.title: [CONTROLPR] Control Print Ltd Enters into Lease Agreements with Assam Industrial Development Corporation Ltd for Land Allotment Under UNNATI Scheme
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Control Print Ltd has entered into Lease Agreements with Assam Industrial Development Corporation Ltd for land allotment to set up manufacturing units under the UNNATI scheme. The company has taken possession of the land pieces and the lease period is 60 years, renewable for a further 30 years. The total consideration amounts to ₹ 861.18 lakhs. This move is expected to expand the business activities of Control Print Ltd.

  • Control Print Ltd has entered into Lease Agreements with Assam Industrial Development Corporation Ltd for land allotment under the UNNATI scheme.
  • The lease period is 60 years, renewable for a further 30 years.
  • The total consideration amounts to ₹ 861.18 lakhs.
  • The land allotment is for setting up manufacturing units for extrusion, coding and marking products and food co-packaging unit(s).
  • This move is expected to expand the business activities of Control Print Ltd.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CONTROL PRINT LTD.-$ | Category: New Launch

item.title: [PNB] Punjab National Bank Announces Changes in Senior Management
item.description:
Punjab National Bank has announced changes in its senior management with effect from 04.04.2026. The changes include new assignments for three Chief General Managers and two Zonal Managers. The new appointees bring a wealth of experience and diverse skills to their new roles.

  • Shri. Previous Assignment has been appointed as Chief General Manager, Operations (General Banking Division and Customer Care Centre), Head Office.
  • Shri. Sanjay Gupta has been appointed as Chief General Manager, Data Privacy & Management Division, Head Office.
  • Shri. Rajesh Prasad has been appointed as Chief General Manager, Operation Division (General Banking Division, Customer Care Centre, ADC & Recon), Head Office.
  • Shri. P Mahendar has been appointed as Zonal Manager, Zonal Office Chennai.
  • Shri. Priyankar Pandey has been appointed as Zonal Manager, Zonal Office, Jaipur.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PUNJAB NATIONAL BANK | Category: New Launch

item.title: [INDUSINDBK] Indusind Bank's QoQ Deposits Grow by 1.6% as of March 31, 2026
item.description:
Indusind Bank Ltd. has released its latest financial figures, showing a quarter-over-quarter (QoQ) growth of 1.6% in deposits as of March 31, 2026. The total deposits stood at Rs. 4,00,178 crores. However, the net advances decreased by 0.8% QoQ to Rs. 3,15,154 crores. The retail deposits and deposits from small business customers amounted to Rs. 1,91,276 crores as of March 31, 2026. This information is subject to audit by the bank's statutory auditors.

  • QoQ growth of 1.6% in deposits as of March 31, 2026
  • Net advances decreased by 0.8% QoQ to Rs. 3,15,154 crores
  • Retail deposits and deposits from small business customers amounted to Rs. 1,91,276 crores as of March 31, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: INDUSIND BANK LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [UTKARSHBNK] Utkarsh Small Finance Bank's Q4 FY26: Disbursements Surge by 30.1%, Advances Grow by 5.6% YoY
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Utkarsh Small Finance Bank Ltd. has reported its un-audited/provisional business update for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The bank's total disbursements for Q4 FY26 stood at ₹ 4,207 Crore, marking a significant increase of 30.1% YoY and 46.1% QoQ. JLG disbursements increased by 2.0% YoY and 58.2% QoQ to ₹ 1,425 Crore. Non-JLG disbursements also saw a substantial growth of 51.4% YoY and 40.6% QoQ to ₹ 2,782 Crore. Gross loan portfolio stood at ₹ 19,333 Crore, a decrease of 1.7% YoY but an increase of 5.6% QoQ. Total deposits stood at ₹ 21,654 Crore, a slight increase of 0.4% YoY and 2.7% QoQ. CASA deposits were at ₹ 5,196 Crore, a rise of 10.6% YoY and 12.7% QoQ. The bank's CASA ratio stood at 24.0%, and the CASA + Retail Term Deposits Ratio was at 82.7%. The Liquidity Coverage Ratio (LCR) stood at 177% as on March 31, 2026. The Q4 FY26 and FY26 figures are provisional and subject to audit by the Joint Statutory Auditors of the Bank and approval of the Audit Committee and Board of Directors.

  • Total disbursements increased by 30.1% YoY and 46.1% QoQ to ₹ 4,207 Crore
  • JLG disbursements rose by 2.0% YoY and 58.2% QoQ to ₹ 1,425 Crore
  • Non-JLG disbursements grew by 51.4% YoY and 40.6% QoQ to ₹ 2,782 Crore
  • Gross loan portfolio stood at ₹ 19,333 Crore, a decrease of 1.7% YoY but an increase of 5.6% QoQ
  • Total deposits stood at ₹ 21,654 Crore, a slight increase of 0.4% YoY and 2.7% QoQ

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Utkarsh Small Finance Bank Ltd | Category: Quarterly Updates

item.title: [MOIL] Moil Ltd Submits Monthly Business Update for March 2026, Showing Increased Production and Sales
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Moil Ltd, in compliance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, has submitted its monthly business update for March 2026. The update reveals an increase in both production and sales of manganese ore for the month and the financial year 2025-26. The company's production for March 2026 stands at 1.64 lakh MT, up from 1.59 lakh MT in March 2025. Similarly, sales for March 2026 are at 2.02 lakh MT, compared to 1.56 lakh MT in March 2025. The cumulative production and sales for FY 2025-26 also show an upward trend, with the company producing 19.07 lakh MT and selling 15.89 lakh MT, compared to 18.03 lakh MT and 15.87 lakh MT respectively in FY 2024-25.

  • Moil Ltd reports increased production and sales for March 2026
  • Production for March 2026 stands at 1.64 lakh MT, up from 1.59 lakh MT in March 2025
  • Sales for March 2026 are at 2.02 lakh MT, compared to 1.56 lakh MT in March 2025
  • Cumulative production and sales for FY 2025-26 also show an upward trend
  • The company produced 19.07 lakh MT and sold 15.89 lakh MT in FY 2025-26

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MOIL LTD. | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [SHREECEM] Shree Cement Ltd. Approves Setting Up of New Integrated Cement Plant in Meghalaya
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Shree Cement Ltd. has announced its plan to set up an Integrated Cement Plant with a clinker capacity of 0.95 MTPA and cement capacity of 0.99 MTPA at Village Daistong, East Jaintia Hills District in the state of Meghalaya. The project, estimated to cost Rs. 1800 crores, is to be financed through internal accruals and debt. The proposed capacity is expected to be added by the quarter ending March, 2028. This expansion is a strategic business decision by the company.

  • Shree Cement Ltd. to set up a new Integrated Cement Plant in Meghalaya
  • The plant will have a clinker capacity of 0.95 MTPA and cement capacity of 0.99 MTPA
  • Estimated investment for the project is Rs. 1800 crores
  • The project will be financed through internal accruals and debt
  • The proposed capacity is expected to be added by the quarter ending March, 2028

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SHREE CEMENT LTD. | Category: New Launch

item.title: [MEHIF] Mehta Integrated Finance Ltd. Receives Court Order to Freeze Shares of Judgement Debtors
item.description:
Mehta Integrated Finance Ltd. has received a court order from the City Civil Court at Ahmedabad, dated 01.04.2026, directing the garnishes to attach the shares held by the present judgement debtors. The order was served on 04.04.2026 to the company and the opposite party. The court has ordered to freeze the shares of the Judgement Debtors lying with the garnishees and dividends accrued thereon with immediate effect. The order is applicable since 2007. The financial implications are yet to be finalised, but the company is allowed to attach the shares held by the present judgement debtors to prevent further transfer or alienation. The court has also imposed a restriction for attaching the shares of the Radhe Developers India Limited, a listed company on BSE Ltd.

  • Mehta Integrated Finance Ltd. receives court order to freeze shares of judgement debtors
  • Order served on 04.04.2026 by Commercial Court at City Civil Court, Ahmedabad
  • Garnishes directed to freeze shares and dividends accrued thereon with immediate effect
  • Order applicable since 2007
  • Company allowed to attach shares of judgement debtors to prevent further transfer or alienation
  • Restriction imposed for attaching shares of Radhe Developers India Limited, a listed company on BSE Ltd.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MEHTA INTEGRATED FINANCE LTD. | Category: Legal

item.title: [IL&FSENGG] IL&FS Engineering and Construction Company Ltd Reports Defaults on Loan Repayments as of 31st March, 2026
item.description:
🔥 Trending

IL&FS Engineering and Construction Company Ltd has disclosed defaults on payment of interest and repayment of principal amounts for loans from banks and financial institutions, as well as unlisted debt securities. The total financial indebtedness of the company, including short-term and long-term debt, stands at INR 3097.07 crore. The company has clarified that no interest is being accrued or provided post the cutoff date, except for the Funded Interest Term Loan (FITL). The disclosures have been made in accordance with SEBI Circular No. SEBI/HO/CFD/CMD1/CIR/P/2019/140 dated 21st November 2019.

  • IL&FS Engineering and Construction Company Ltd reports defaults on loan repayments as of 31st March, 2026.
  • The total financial indebtedness of the company stands at INR 3097.07 crore.
  • No interest is being accrued or provided post the cutoff date, except for the Funded Interest Term Loan (FITL).
  • The disclosures have been made in accordance with SEBI Circular No. SEBI/HO/CFD/CMD1/CIR/P/2019/140 dated 21st November 2019.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: IL&FS ENGINEERING AND CONSTRUCTION COMPANY LTD. | Category: Quarterly Updates
